home.bio: I'm Nathaniel, a Software Engineer based in Seoul, building towards a career in Computer Vision and Perception for autonomous vehicles. Recent Computer Software Eng. grad from Hanyang University (GKS Scholar).

resume.about: Software Engineer, experienced in building Data and Backend Systems.
resume.virtualNote: NOTE: This was a virtual internship, and the duration for the internship is not in actual reality the time it took me to complete the tasks required to obtain a certificate.

achievements: Fine-tuned multiple time-series LLM architectures (Llama 3.2 1B, ChatTS) on 4.4M satellite conjunction events using Unsloth, PEFT and QLoRA techniques with 8GB VRAM constraints.
Optimised SpaceTube's post ranking algorithm, reducing response time from 257ms to 109ms (58% improvement) with TypeScript.
Implemented real-time error monitoring system using Google Chat webhooks to alert on payment and API errors with FastAPI and NestJS.
Developed RAG system using HuggingFace embeddings and ChromaDB retrieval to improve responses for space domain queries.
Implemented ETL pipeline for livestock data processing, extracted 10+ hours of real-world audio and transformed through various denoising techniques for ML classification.
Experimented with band-pass filtering and autoencoder-based denoising to optimise audio quality, achieving over 90% model convergence.
Developed ML pipeline that scraped and analysed over 75,000 customer reviews for sentiment analysis.
Using Random Forest and XGBoost, customer booking prediction achieved 85% accuracy.

skillItems.label: Frameworks & Libraries
skillItems.value: NestJS, FastAPI, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, Scikit-Learn, OpenCV, Unsloth

skillItems.label: ML / AI
skillItems.value: LLM Fine-tuning (QLoRA), RAG Pipelines, Computer Vision, NeRF, 3D Gaussian Splatting

skillItems.label: Platforms & Tools
skillItems.value: Git, Ubuntu/Linux, Docker, AWS (EC2, S3), COLMAP, nerfStudio, Streamlit

seoulflow.description: Real-time traffic congestion monitoring system using live Seoul CCTV footage. Detects and tracks vehicles with YOLOv8 and Kalman Filter, classifies congestion levels, and visualizes traffic density across key Seoul intersections.
seoulflow.techStack: Python, YOLOv8, OpenCV, Kalman Filter, FastAPI, CUDA, Chrome Extensions (Manifest V3)

epc.description: Production-grade data engineering pipeline for Oil & Gas procurement intelligence. Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) tracking supplier risk, trade trends, and material category performance across 7 countries and 92 materials.
epc.techStack: Python, PySpark, Supabase PostgreSQL, Streamlit, Pandas, Plotly, Parquet, SQLAlchemy

reconstruction.description: Graduation project where I implemented and compared NeRF, Vanilla 3DGS, Scaffold-GS, and Feature-GS on self-collected multi-view datasets, modified the 3DGS CUDA rasterizer to resolve OOM errors on an RTX 2070 (8GB VRAM), enabling full training under hardware constraints. Integrated SAM embeddings into Feature-GS for 3D object segmentation and interactive manipulation via Open3D.
reconstruction.techStack: Python, PyTorch, COLMAP, NerfStudio, Open3D, SAM, MeshLab, CUDA 11.8

startupai.description: Multi-agent AI platform where LLM agents (CEO, CTO, CFO, COO) collaborate in a roundtable to auto-generate startup pitch decks. Built the LangGraph orchestration pipeline and initial MVP independently.
startupai.techStack: Python, LangGraph, OpenAI GPT-4o, RAG Pipeline, Streamlit

signlanguage.description: Real-time hand landmark detection using MediaPipe and a Random Forest classifier for sign language gesture recognition. Built a custom dataset and used OpenCV for live video stream preprocessing.

petmeeting.description: Flutter app for connecting pet owners. Spearheaded project planning and built the frontend.
